title: Without Dowry
writer: Aleksandr Ostrovskiy, Yakov Protazanov, Vladimir Shvejtser
actors: Olga Pyzhova, Nina Alisova, Anatoli Ktorov
plot: Larisa Ogudolova (Nina Alisova), unlike her sisters, refuses to obey her mother's wish that she marry a wealthy old man in order to collect a dowry. She falls in love with a dashing scoundrel who betrays her in about sixty minutes...
